channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Social Security funds could run short by 2032, program's Trustees warn
item.description: A trust fund that helps to finance Social Security benefits is expected to run out of money in less than seven years — unless Congress acts to patch t...

item.title: To find the World Cup's Cinderellas, we have to start with the group stage
item.description: Uzbekistan, Jordan, Cape Verde and Curacao are making their World Cup debut. Meanwhile, Scotland, South Africa, Canada, and New Zealand (just to name ...

item.title: Big tobacco hooked us on ultra-processed foods. It might teach us how to cut back
item.description: A study in the American Journal of Public Health explores the link between ultra-processed foods and the tobacco industry.

item.title: Trump confirms Iran shot down helicopter, says U.S. 'must' respond
item.description: Trump confirmed the two pilots were unharmed and safe.
